one_time_description: Insurance proceeds received related to November 2022 fire at Lot 16 development that caused $1,687,886 in damage
economic_notes: Nation has investments in KFN Enterprises Ltd. (100%), Choxw Holdings Corp. (100%), and KFN Enterprises Limited Partnership (99.99%). KFN Enterprises LP had callable debt of $6,961,957 with Bank of Montreal loans guaranteed by the Nation up to $9,220,000. KFN Enterprises LP recorded a net loss of $5,992,083 in 2024 compared to net earnings of $721,410 in 2023. Consolidated Social Housing Program included. Property tax revenue collected. BC Hydro and Fortis BC pipeline project revenues received.
notes: Nation uses modified equity method for 3 government business enterprises (KFN Enterprises Ltd., Choxw Holdings Corp., KFN Enterprises Limited Partnership). KFN Enterprises LP recorded a large loss of $5,992,083 in 2024 causing negative OSR and overall deficit. Nation guarantees $9.22M in Bank of Montreal loans for KFN Enterprises LP with $6,961,957 drawn. Construction in progress of $5,204,745 not yet amortized. Adopted PS 3400 Revenue prospectively April 1, 2023. GICs held in trust for minor band members ($2,001,892) included in both portfolio investments and accounts payable. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,839,663 + other government revenues from segment schedule $6,845,984 = $8,685,647. OSR is effectively negative due to large business entity losses. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text.
